title: euphorbia obtusifolia subsp. regis-jubae
intro: Euphorbia obtusifolia subsp. regis-jubae is a rare and endemic succulent species found in the Canary Islands, particularly in the island of Fuerteventura. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Euphorbia obtusifolia subsp. regis-jubae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions by boiling its leaves and roots in water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
